hero: Women Bodycon Midi Length Dress (Fyre Rose)
stylist_rationale: Black midi with a gold chain waist detail; gold crystal slingback pumps echo that hardware, and a soft blush box clutch keeps the eye on the dress.
Sleek wine square-neck bodycon; nude-tan kitten sandals lengthen the line and a silver sparkle clutch adds just enough shine.
Magenta ruched slip dress with white pointed ankle-booties for an edgy contrast; a black quilted chain sling grounds the brights.

hero: Women Embellished Anarkali Kurta Suit Set (SVARAA)
stylist_rationale: Dusty blue-grey anarkali with gold embroidery; brown silver-trimmed juttis and a silver stone necklace stay tonal, black clutch finishes it.

hero: Women Floral Woven Banarasi Silk Saree (Styleelite)
stylist_rationale: Classic red Banarasi silk with gold zari; gold embellished juttis, a gold-kundan red-stone set and a gold pearl potli all pick up the zari — full traditional bridal-guest look.
Deep-purple embellished sharara set; wine block pumps with a gold buckle sit in the same rich family, kept light with simple drop earrings.
